ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT TERRA SCHOOLS HEARING SET FOR MAY-11-2026 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL WARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TERRA SCHOOLS IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS JULIE WALLACE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-04-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE HURLEY. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL WARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TERRA SCHOOLS IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURELY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WARD, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TERRA SCHOOLS $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
